description: Dripify is a cloud-based LinkedIn automation tool that runs drip outreach campaigns, so sales teams, agencies, and recruiters can generate leads on autopilot.
overview: Dripify automates LinkedIn outreach with cloud-based drip campaigns, team management, performance analytics, and data export, helping teams prospect and follow up without manual work.
what_is: Dripify is a sales automation tool that streamlines LinkedIn and email outreach. It connects with, messages, and follows up with prospects automatically, and personalizes messages using a wide set of variables to lift response rates.

It fits sales teams, business owners, recruiters, and agencies running lead-generation campaigns. Because it runs in the cloud, campaigns keep working without your machine on, and the analytics view shows how each sequence is performing.

Dripify integrates with CRMs, email tools, and enrichment platforms, slotting into a go-to-market stack as the outreach-automation layer. It is focused on prospecting and follow-up rather than full marketing automation or customer support.
